message:
test(visual-fx): add backdrop composition unit tests (bd-l8x9.8.5)

Add 10 comprehensive unit tests for multi-layer backdrop composition:

Ordering:
- ordering_a_over_b_not_equal_b_over_a
- ordering_opaque_top_covers_bottom

Alpha correctness:
- alpha_correctness_matches_explicit_over_math
- alpha_correctness_three_layer_composition
- alpha_correctness_cell_by_cell_patterns

Determinism:
- determinism_fixed_inputs_produce_identical_hash
- determinism_across_resize_cycles

Allocation stability:
- allocation_no_growth_after_warmup
- allocation_grows_only_when_needed

Blend modes:
- blend_modes_produce_distinct_results

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
